name: Hot Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 375F degrees.
Combine all ingredients and place in a shallow baking dish (An oblong au gratin-type dish makes a pretty presentation).
Bake 10 to 15 minutes until hot and bubbly.
Serve with tortilla chips or toast points.

similar.name: Warm Roasted Pepper and Artichoke Spread
Artichoke Dip With Parmesan and Mozzarella

name: Artichoke Dip With Parmesan and Mozzarella
directions: Mix artichokes, mozzarella cheese, mayo, onion, garlic salt, pepper, Tabasco, and 1/2 cup parmesan cheese in a bowl.
Place in a microwave safe casserole dish (8x8 inch or 2 quart size or similar)and top with remaining parmesan cheese.
Heat in microwave or oven until bubbly. Garnish with olives if desired.

similar.name: The Very Best Spinach Artichoke Dip Ever

name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
directions: Mix together all ingredients.
Bake for 20 minutes at 400 degrees farenheit. (Cooking time and temperature may vary depending on the oven you are using.  Cook until golden around the edges and light golden on the top.).

name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cook the spinach according to the package directions.
Chop the aritchoke hearts.
Drain the spinach.
Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
Spread the mixture in a 9x13 pan, and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 20-30 minutes or until hot.
Serve warm with tortilla chips or a sliced baguette.

similar.name: The Very Best Spinach Artichoke Dip Ever

name: Cheesy Spinach Artichoke Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients in a microwavable dish.
Heat in short bursts, stirring frequently.
Serve hot with veggies, crackers, bagels, what have you.
This keeps well in the fridge so you can make it ahead. Just reheat when ready to eat.

name: Warm Spinach Cheesy Dip
directions: Thaw spinach and drain.
Combine all ingredients EXCEPT 1/2 cup mozzarella cheese and bread crumbs.
Pour into pie plate and bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes covered.
Take out of oven and cover with bread crumbs and remaining cheese and broil in oven until toasted (about 3 minutes).

similar.name: The Very Best Hot Artichoke Spinach Dip

name: The Very Best Hot Artichoke Spinach Dip
directions: In a medium bowl, mix together all ingredients except only 1/2 cup of the parmesan cheese.
Spread into a shallow baking dish.
Sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup parmesan cheese.
Bake, uncovered, 30 minutes until bubbly.
Serve warm with tortilla chips or toasted sliced bread.

similar.name: The Very Best Spinach Artichoke Dip Ever

name: Warm Roasted Pepper and Artichoke Spread
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. In a food processor bowl with a metal blade, combine the cheese, mayonnaise, cream cheese, and garlic and process until smooth.
Pour mixture into a bowl. Add artichoke hearts and roasted peppers; blend well.
Spread in an ungreased 9-inch quiche dish or glass pie dish.
Bake at 350 degrees for 20 - 25 minutes or until thorougly heated. Serve warm with crackers, veggies, or snack bread slices.

similar.name: Artichoke Dip With Parmesan and Mozzarella

name: The Very Best Spinach Artichoke Dip Ever
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
In a deep fry pan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add cream cheese and garlic, stir 3-4 minutes or until the cream cheese melts.
Add artichokes, sour cream, and 1 1/2 cup of mozzarella (save 1/2 cup for the topping).
Fold in spinach approximately 1 cup at a time and let the spinach reduce (this takes patience -- but it's worth it!).
Optional for heat:  mix in jalepenos (1-3 tblsp chopped, canned or fresh) and/or crushed red pepper flakes (1 tsp).
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish and sprinkle the remaining 1/2 cup mozzarella over the top.
Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes or until top is lightly browned.
Let cool 5 minutes, serve with pita chips for dipping or as a spread.

similar.name: The Very Best Hot Artichoke Spinach Dip

name: Baked Artichoke Spread
directions: Preheat oven to 350.
In a large bowl, thoroughly mix the mayonnaise, parmesan, artichokes, mozzarella, and garlic powder.
Transfer the mixture to an 8x8" baking pan.
Bake 30 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly.
Sprinkle with paprika and serve immediately.

similar.name: Warm Roasted Pepper and Artichoke Spread
Artichoke Dip With Parmesan and Mozzarella

name: Caramelized Onion, Spinach & Artichoke Dip
directions: Heat nonstick or cast iron pan over medium-high heat for 1 minute.
Spray pan with cooking spray and heat for another minute.
Add onion and saute until carmelized, 5-10 minutes, stirring often.
Add garlic and saute 1 minute.
Add spinach and cook for 2 minutes or until wilted.
Remove from heat and let cool for 2-3 minutes.
Preheat oven to 350°F
Put artichokes and spinach-onion mixture in a food processor fitted with a standard cutting blade.
Chop for 1 minute.
Add cream cheese, sour cream, and yogurt and whirl for 2 minutes.
Add Parmesan, chives, pepper, Cajun seasoning, and salt.
Chop for another 2-3 minutes or until vegetables are finely minced and entire mixture is well-blended.
Place dip in 4 qt ceramic baking dish.
Bake for 20 minutes or until top is lightly browned.
Remove from heat and serve with vegetables, crackers, and bread.

similar.name: The Very Best Spinach Artichoke Dip Ever

name: Spinach and Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Place cottage cheese, Parmesan cheese, and cream cheese into a food processor or blender until thoroughly combined and there are no noticeable curds.
Combine spinach, artichokes, garlic, and the cheese mixture in a large mixing bowl. (I do this step using my hands.).
Add Salt and Pepper to taste. You won't need much salt as the Parmesan is naturally salty.
Place mixture into an oven safe baking dish.
Sprinkle reserved cheddar cheese on top.
Bake for about 20 minutes, until the cheese has melted and the dip is warm throughout. A slight golden crust at the edge of the dish is fine.
Let stand for 5 minutes.
Serve with your favorite crackers, veggie sticks, etc -- .

similar.name: The Very Best Spinach Artichoke Dip Ever

name: Baked Artichoke Spread
directions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
Place all ingredients in a food processor and puree until smooth.
Place in a shallow ceramic baker or a 10" terra-cotta quiche dish.
Bake for 30-45 minutes or until lightly browned on top.
Serve with tortilla chips, french bread, fresh vegetables or crackers.

similar.name: Warm Roasted Pepper and Artichoke Spread

name: Hot Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix chopped artichoke hearts, garlic powder, green onions, crumbled bacon, Parmesan cheese and mayonnaise; put in a 2-quart ovenproof dish.
Bake, uncovered, for 25 minutes. Sprinkle with paprika.

similar.name: Artichoke Dip With Parmesan and Mozzarella

name: Artichoke Dip Bread (Slice and Serve!)
directions: Mix the artichoke hearts, green onions, garlic, cream cheese, mayonnaise, sour cream, mozzarella and parmigiano reggiano reserving some of the cheese.
Hollow 1/2 an inch out of the center of both halves of the bread.
Spread the mixture into the hole in the bread slices and top with the reserved cheese.
Bake in a preheated 350F oven covered in foil for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue to bake until the cheese is melted and golden brown.

similar.name: The Very Best Spinach Artichoke Dip Ever
Artichoke Dip With Parmesan and Mozzarella
